chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 6340 of 2024 ___________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge(s) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of main case. 04.02.2025 Petitioner No.2, Mst. Shumaila Waheed, is present in person and she is unable to assist as to how the petitioners fall within qualification of aggrieved person per Article 199 of the Constitution. In view hereof, petition being misconceived is dismissed in limine. Judge Judge Khuhro/PA
